user_stories.title: User can place an order for food delivery
user_stories.goal: Place an order for food delivery to their location
user_stories.benefit: Conveniently order food for delivery without leaving their home
acceptance_criteria: User can view available food options
User can select a food item and customize order
User can enter their delivery address
User can confirm order and receive a confirmation message with estimated delivery time
User can track the status of their order in real-time

user_stories.title: Restaurant can manage their menu and accept orders
user_stories.goal: Manage menu items and accept orders for delivery
user_stories.benefit: Efficiently manage orders and update menu items in real-time
acceptance_criteria: Restaurant can view and update menu items
Restaurant can see real-time order notifications
Restaurant can accept or decline orders
Restaurant can communicate with the user regarding order status

user_stories.title: Delivery driver can manage their route and accept orders
user_stories.goal: Manage their route and accept orders for delivery
user_stories.benefit: Efficiently manage their delivery route and accept orders
acceptance_criteria: Driver can view their current route and upcoming orders
Driver can accept or decline orders
Driver can navigate to the delivery location using the app
Driver can update order status in real-time
Driver can communicate with the user regarding estimated delivery time
